topicOverview: An in-depth deep dive into Firebase Auth & Firestore. Mastering this is critical for passing technical interviews for Mobile App Developer roles.
whyItMatters: Firebase Auth & Firestore is a core foundation of modern engineering. Interviewers use it as a proxy to test your deeper understanding of systems, performance, and best practices.
examples: Implementing Firebase Auth & Firestore in a real-world scenario
Handling edge cases in Firebase Auth & Firestore
practiceQuestions: Write a program demonstrating Firebase Auth & Firestore.
Fix the bug in the given Firebase Auth & Firestore snippet.
interviewQuestions: Explain Firebase Auth & Firestore to a 5-year-old.
What are the pros and cons of Firebase Auth & Firestore?
How does Firebase Auth & Firestore handle memory management?
advancedProjects: Integrate Firebase Auth & Firestore into a microservice
Scale Firebase Auth & Firestore for 10k concurrent users
companyQuestions: How Google tests Firebase Auth & Firestore
